title: Tsiyts #6732
definition:
Ziz = "flower"

 1) a pass going from the shores of the Dead Sea to the wilderness of
    Judah near Tekoa
nasbUsage:

 1) a pass going from the shores of the Dead Sea to the wilderness of
    Judah near Tekoa

    NASB:  a pass between the Dead Sea and Jer.
